ddls:
CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the action (e.g., Selection, Presentation) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language setting used by the user */,
  "database" TEXT /* Database from which the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Presentation) */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action performed (e.g., tableViewLayout1) */,
  "table_id" TEXT /* ID of the table accessed */,
  "number_of_cells" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the table */,
  "number_of_contents" INTEGER /* Number of contents in the table */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID to track user sessions */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_database FOREIGN KEY ("database") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was last updated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "table_path" TEXT /* File path to the table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "database_id" TEXT /* ID of the database the table belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was last updated */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the table in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)
